area_program_compliance.notes: All 10 spaces from the approved area program are present and within tolerance of approved sqm values. Covered terrace (55 sqm) and pool deck (45 sqm) are fully detailed with structural requirements for coastal wind exposure. Total designed area: 356 sqm — matches area-program.json.

structural_coordination_notes: Structural engineer engaged. Wind load study inputs reviewed and integrated: roof uplift calculations complete for the horizontal roof plane with extended eave at covered terrace; wind-rated glazing specifications confirmed for all west-facing (Pacific) openings. Coastal zone salt-air exposure class documented for all metal connections and hardware. Pool structural design initiated — pool deck and pool tank are designed as a monolithic reinforced concrete structure due to coastal conditions. Foundation type: mat/raft foundation on compact coastal substrate. Structural engineer's preliminary drawings reviewed and coordinated with architectural set. No unresolved conflicts.
